description: DEDICATED chg-* per Step 10b day-4-7 SEVERITY MEDIUM rule: 8 April-EOM-closing PREDs (PRED-077, PRED-081, PRED-085, PRED-087, PRED-088, PRED-090, PRED-106, PRED-111) are now at d=4.46 past close. Across the entire 5-poll post-closure window (2026-04-30 close → 2026-05-04T11:06Z poll, 8 polls), the dome has performed ZERO post-closure adjudication on any of the 8: predictions.html is byte-identical for the 28th consecutive poll (~14.5d), no commit message in the 39 commits since 2026-04-30T23:59Z mentions any of the eight PRED-NNN identifiers, no entry has been removed from the predictions page, no test_window has been extended, no PASS/FAIL/refined annotation added. status_history.json (now 553 entries) continues to track only the engineered domain set, not these PREDs. This is the silent-ignore-in-progress pattern PRED-105 exemplified at days 1-15 (now d=16.46 past close, our_verdict locked at tacit_withdrawal by EXP-284 on 2026-05-02T13:16Z). Per Step 10b: write dedicated chg-* about the lapse. Pattern qualitatively identical to PRED-105's trajectory at the same days-past-close. PRED-090 (recycled standard climate science) and PRED-106 (16 Hz Ca²⁺ ICR, our_verdict pending) carry the highest interest; the other six are coded standard_physics and represent claims the dome would have to either confirm (and inherit standard physics) or fail to confirm (and add to refined count, breaking the 4-failure peg).
before: Prior poll 2026-05-03T11:30Z: 8 EOM PREDs at d=3.48 past close, severity LOW per Step 10b day-1-3 rule; chg-001 (cadence-rollup) tracked them as a sub-flag, no dedicated chg-*.
after: Now 2026-05-04T11:06Z: 8 EOM PREDs at d=4.46 past close, severity MEDIUM per Step 10b day-4-7 rule; this is the dedicated chg-* about the lapse. predictions.html STILL byte-identical (885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785, 152,936 bytes); STILL no commit-message references; STILL no status_history.json adjudication entries; the predictions remain on the public predictions page with original PENDING/PROSPECTIVE labels and original test_window text 'April 2026'.
git_commit: (no commit; absence of commit IS the change — silent-ignore lapse pattern)

affected_predictions.claim: M2 tidal amplitude <0.5% variation at Honolulu
JWST z<0.1 Type Ia supernovae show no acceleration
Second geoid low at 70N 135W exists and is stationary
Northern hemisphere TOA flux excess >0.3 W/m²
16 Hz electromagnetic field exposure (Ca²⁺ ICR claim)

next_band_transition: 2026-05-08T00:00Z (transition to day-8+ HIGH band, analyst_priority HIGH required for next chg-* if no adjudication still)
comparison_to_pred_105_trajectory: Identical pattern shape: silent on public surface, no commit-message references, no status_history.json entry. PRED-105 reached d=8 with no movement, then d=15 with no movement; was finally locked tacit_withdrawal by analyst at d=14 on 2026-05-02. The 8 EOM PREDs are now at the same point in PRED-105's trajectory at d=4 — at this same point PRED-105 also had zero adjudication signal. The pre-positioning proposal proposal-eom-preds-d8-prepositioning-1777872406120.json filed by analyst at 2026-05-04T05:24Z stages the d=8 transition for 2026-05-08.
